text: Machine learning is a type of artificial intelligence where computers learn from data. In supervised learning, the computer is given training data, which includes examples with the correct answers. The computer uses this data to build a model, which is like a set of rules. Once the model is ready, it can make predictions on new, unseen data. For instance, a model trained on house sizes and prices can predict the price of a new house. After making predictions, we measure the accuracy to see how often the model is correct. The higher the accuracy, the better the model has learned.
